notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the tigervnc SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 3 CVEs: CVE-2024-31080, CVE-2024-31081, CVE-2024-31083.
notes.title: Description
